title: PMWeather + TFC
description: Synchronizes TerraFirmaCraft climate, seasons and calendar systems with PM's Weather.
body:
**PMWeather-TFC is an addon that integrates [ProtoManly's Weather](https://modrinth.com/mod/protomanlys-weather) with [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) climate,calendar and progression systems.**

Features:

* TFC-based temperature and rainfall integration
* Improved dew point and humidity calculations
* TFC progression-compatible recipes
* Wildfire compatibility for TFC grass
  
This addon is designed for realistic and immersive survival-focused modpacks using TerraFirmaCraft and PMWeather together.
